queries.plan:
Estimate    Actual  Operator
       1         1  PROJECT count AS _col0
       1         1  AGGREGATE COUNT(count_5) AS count
       -         1  DISTRIBUTE GATHER
       -         1  AGGREGATE COUNT(o_orderkey) AS count_5
       -         6  GROUP BY HASH o_orderkey, o_custkey, unique_value
       -         6  INNER JOIN HASH ON operator_add = operator_add_4
       -         1  │└DISTRIBUTE GATHER
  150000         1  │ PROJECT c_custkey + 1 AS operator_add_4
  150000         1  │ FILTER c_custkey = 1
  150000    150000  │ TABLE SCAN customer
 1500000   1500000  PROJECT o_orderkey, o_custkey, unique_value, o_custkey + 1 AS operator_add
 1500000   1500000  PROJECT o_orderkey, o_custkey, row_number() OVER() AS unique_value
 1500000   1500000  TABLE SCAN orders
queries.sql:
SELECT COUNT(o.o_orderkey)
FROM tpch_sf1.orders AS o
WHERE EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM tpch_sf1.customer AS c
  WHERE c.c_custkey + 1 = o.o_custkey + 1
    AND c.c_custkey = 1
);

theorem.description: Count ORDERS rows with a matching CUSTOMER via EXISTS on +1 adjusted keys and a one-sided CUSTOMER key filter
theorem.name: PLAN_JOIN_CHECK-SEMI-ORDERS-CUSTOMER-PLUS1-FILTER-CUSTOMER
